Howling Harpoon  
 

Lore Item Placeable
Slot: RANGE PRIMARY
Skill: 1H Piercing Atk Delay: 35
DMG: 13 Dmg Bonus: 35
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
WIS: +6 MANA: +40
Effect: Stun (Combat, Casting Time: Instant) at Level 40
WT: 4.2 Size: MEDIUM
Class: SHM
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)

DMG: 13 Dmg Bonus: 35

Solusek
QuoteReply
# Jun 26 2003 at 4:32 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591775009710
8 posts
Sorting Shaman piercers by Wisdom, this spear and 2 others are the highest you can get before entering Planes and no-drop weapons (Sky, Time, etc).

Purchased for 400pp in the Sol Ro Bazaar 6/24/03.

QuoteReply
# Feb 14 2003 at 12:08 PM Rating: Decent

2 posts
I'm a lv 7 SHM (dont laugh) and i have this. It is an awesome weapon to have at low levels even w/o the proc and at high levels too.
▲ Page top
Which one?
QuoteReply
# Nov 28 2002 at 1:40 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591783965906
235 posts
Ok, yesterday I was very lucky. I accidently spent 12pp on a chain helm, and then auct'd for banded armor. This 64 warr says she'll make me any pieces i need for FREE. That was good because I couldn't afford too many, so she makes me all but neck and legs. Anyway, I asked if she knew good piercing weps (I'm a Shaman) and she said lemme check on my alt. She comes to the area with the alt and GIVES me Spine Chill Spear, Howling Harpoon, Runed Circlet, and a few other items, for FREE!!! Now my question is, which spear is better? I have a piercing of 9 lol (I'm lvl 10) so is one better to raise my skill or anything? Right now I use the Spine since its faster and the HH can go in my range so i can get its stats as well. Thank you.

Hakunin, 10 Shaman
Finkel Micromagi <Gambits of Fate>, 24 Magician
Willeren, 17 Ranger
Tunare Server
▲ Page top
RE: Which one?
QuoteReply
# Apr 10 2003 at 9:15 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1694996185141
Scholar
137 posts
The faster the weapon, the more times you will swing at your target. The more times you swing, the more times you will get skill checks and thus you "Should" raise the skill faster.
▲ Page top
Which one?
QuoteReply
# Nov 28 2002 at 1:35 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591783965906
235 posts
▲ Page top
Spear is good
QuoteReply
# Nov 10 2002 at 4:52 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591780332577
26 posts
its a good spear i tink. the stun is good stats are good. 6 wis 40 mana. i got it for 400 plat good price i think. it a good shammy item
▲ Page top
Howling Harpoon
QuoteReply
# Jun 27 2002 at 6:51 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591776410526
Sage
280 posts
Some time ago this weapon had its range value removed so it cannot be thrown now. Its one of the nicer range items a shaman can get. I saw a 52 mage /auc in EC for 500pp. I sent him a tell immediately and met him at T1. When he got there he said that he would take 300pp for it--I didnt even try to bargain him down. Very nice for the WIS/mana addition and even tho its a fairly high damage piercer by the time it procs at level 40 a shaman trying to melee XP giving mobs with this will get eaten alive, even if they are slowed. Still, might be useful fighting a mob that gates or CH's at low health. A slime coated harpoon is better for raising piercing skill since it has 10 less delay.

54 Ogre BattleMystic on Luclin server--Aggrok
▲ Page top
RE: Howling Harpoon
QuoteReply
# Mar 08 2003 at 10:29 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592256582364
17 posts
As of March 8th, 2003, this item still has it's range value on it.

Is this better, I'm depating weather I should get this or usemy spine chill spear can anyone answer this for me?

QuoteReply
# Mar 17 2002 at 1:19 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591771795365
5 posts
I would like to take a moment to thank fellow guild member Falgoth (retireing Kelvenmor) for giving me this weapon for next to nothing. I am using it in the range slot with a Jade Chockidai Prod in Primary. Anyone have any thoughts as to what my next weapon upgrade should be?

Orhavann Vonheeganhoven
Shaman of the 39th Season
Dragoon Warriors

If it can kill you, It can make you stronger.

What a fine suggestion, Jabbezz. Thank you very much. I don't know about a place for you to stand, but I'm pretty sure I could supply the fulcrum and lever. :)
▲ Page top
Gift
QuoteReply
# Jan 14 2002 at 2:59 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591753593278
13 posts
I was in FV running to the bridge when all of a sudden a warrior yells for help right in front of me. I freaked out because I was a tad drunk - and everything was moving side to side. Anyway, I greater healed the lvl 53 warrior. It sucked my mana dry so I went to med in front of the bank. A few seconds later he asks if I have a howling harpoon. I said no. He asked if I wanted one. To my shock and amazement he GAVE me the HH! I just couldn't believe it. I was amazed at his kindness. Thanks Tatar.

Geldori Icepetal
42 Barbarian Shaman ~ Tunare
▲ Page top
RE: Gift
QuoteReply
# Nov 08 2002 at 6:03 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591759616135
3 posts
You managed to pop off a Greater Heal while you were drunk and swaying side to side.....and you weren't interrupted? Ok.....
▲ Page top
RE: Gift
QuoteReply
# Nov 03 2003 at 5:45 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592254670805
Scholar
1,817 posts
If channeling is high enough it is very possible. I've done it a few times with higher spells.
▲ Page top
Proc in Range Slot?
QuoteReply
# Jan 11 2002 at 10:30 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591755007373
2 posts
Sorry for the stupid question in advance :)

But, if this is equipped in the RANGE slot, can the proc still go off while fighting with other weapons? Thanks.
▲ Page top
RE: Proc in Range Slot?
QuoteReply
# Jan 16 2002 at 10:12 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592758208932
22 posts
No, a weapon only has a chande to proc when you attack with it, therefore only the weapon in your primary would have a chance to proc. It might proc if you throw it at a mob, but I don't think anyone would really want to do that.
▲ Page top
RE: Proc in Range Slot?
QuoteReply
# Sep 03 2002 at 3:50 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591754485058
Guru
221 posts
A weapon will proc if in your off hand as well, if you had dual wield as a skill.
▲ Page top

▲ Page top
Spine Chill vs Howling
QuoteReply
# Aug 21 2001 at 9:09 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592250664241
1 post
Just some food for thought. I recently picked up a spine chill spear for 750pp (A bargain by all accounts). It has a dmg ratio of 2.8 (10 28dly) which is slightly better than the howling harpoon as well as +6wis, +2sta, and 10sv v cold. It only weighs 3 and procs shock of ice (38dd). I guess the stun effect of the howling harpoon may at first glance seem a little better, but given that I normally pull using Tagars when soloing I find the Spine chill a better option and can normally get as many hits in while a mob is slowed plus my first dot as when it is stunned especially when puppy is in play as well. Any thoughts?
▲ Page top
RE: Spine Chill vs Howling
QuoteReply
# Sep 21 2001 at 6:21 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591758653941
14 posts
well seeing as how the spine chill spear cant be put in the range slot and you had this and the spine chill spear you'd have to put the howling harpoon in the range slot and wield the chill spear.
▲ Page top
Price Data
QuoteReply
# Jul 23 2001 at 5:12 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591759331737
3 posts
I just bought one on Cazic Thule server. 2 guys were auctioning them in EC. One wanted 3k obo the other wanted 2k obo. I bought it for 1500pp off the second guy...Ogres just act dumb 8)
▲ Page top
Howling Harpoon info
QuoteReply
# Jun 11 2001 at 11:14 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591754583086
7 posts
Greetings,

Ok look. This harpoon can drop off Spectral Curates and also off Callers - where I got mine.

ALL loot in Karnor Castle is rare and random. Drolvarg Sentries can drop SS Boots, etc etc. The named mobs drop items as well, but this zone is random.

This harpoon DOES fit in range slot (I had mine equipped there), it does proc stun and it can be thrown if in a range slot.

▲ Page top
